Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Rose Tower]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The Rose Tower is located on the eastern side of the Palace complex, next to the wall, and is two miles away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The Rose Tower is seven stories tall with smooth white plaster sides and tiered red tiles on the roof.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The Rose Tower is a location guarded by Luminians and Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Rose Tower is being attacked.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — The meeting is set to take place in the Rose Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Consultants secured exits around the Rose Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Rose Tower is seven stories tall and rectangular with white walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Rose Tower is at the base of which Estyr Six stands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The characters pass through an archway into the Rose Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Rose Tower contains a large square room with a long table and chairs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — The Rose Tower is located at the base of which Shera peered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — The top of the Rose Tower shook during the battle between Estyr and two Guild Heads.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Shera and Meia walk out of the Rose Tower.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
